programme.desc: A strict IRS auditor (Phyllis Diller) falls for Capt. Stubing (Gavin MacLeod) until she finds something in his file.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) has trouble on the high seas when the Love Boat crew discovers he has included some racy tales about them in his new novel.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a poignant episode, Capt. Stubling (Gavin McLeod) is reunited with his love child, Vicki (Jill Whelan).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Julie (Lauren Tewes) joins the ship's secret all-male club, she is shocked by the initiation rites.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A swinging bachelor (Dack Rambo) gets the shock of his life when the phony story he tells his gorgeous girlfriend (Barbi Benton) turns out to be true.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A college professor (Dick Martin) turns the Love Boat into a laboratory to test the romantic responses of his lovely female student (Char Fontane).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A tantalizing entertainer (Charo) receives some unwanted advice on love from members of the crew, who don't approve of her marriage plans.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a special two-hour presentation, a singer (Donny Osmond) trying to break into show business finds out unexpectedly that his hillbilly family has decided to take the cruise.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Doc (Bernie Kopell) comes down with a bad case of heartache when the beautiful girl (Misty Rowe) he wants to be alone with boards ship with her ever-present sister (Vicki Lawrence).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A brilliant plain-Jane (Shelley Hack) becomes a fetching glamour gal with the help of Julie (Lauren Tewes), and falls in love with a man (Kevin Tighe) who has some mistaken ideas about her.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) finds himself in a precarious position when he meets a beautiful former school chum (Bernadette Stanis) and her macho husband (Clifton Davis).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Romance and comic intrigue reign on the high seas as 25 engaged couples board the Pacific Princess to compete in a "Marriage-A-Thon Cruise." (Part 1)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Darren McGavin, as dynamic promoter Larry Evans, recruits the services of "The Love Boat" to take the brides-and-grooms-to-be, who are competing for a house, a car, and $50,000 in cash, on a cruise that will wind up in a mass wedding in Acapulco. (Part 2)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Love Boat sails on a fantastic voyage to the most exciting ports in the Caribbean with a famed mystery writer (Pernell Roberts) who is willing to pay $100,000 to one of his hand-picked guests to solve the mystery of his missing nephew.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.desc: A small group, including Rick, runs into hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria, and some may not make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Beth siguen viajando juntos y Beth le revela que no quiere morir sin haber probado nunca el alcohol. A pesar de que Daryl se muestra contrario a sus intenciones, Beth se emborracha y, de esta forma, ambos se conocen mejor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras buscan Terminus, Maggie, Sasha y Bob discuten fuertemente y terminan separándose, sin percatarse de que son más vulnerables estando solos. Mientras, Daryl y Beth han encontrado cobijo en una funeraria, pero una horda de zombis los ataca.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tyreese, Carol, Lizzie, Mika y Judith llegan a una cabaña mientras buscan Terminus. Allí, Lizzie enloquece y muestra una fascinación por la muerte que hiela la sangre de Carol y Tyreese.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn y Tara se reencuentran con Maggie, Sasha y Bob en un túnel repleto de zombis mientras se aproximan a Terminus. Entretanto, Daryl se ve obligado a viajar con el mismo grupo de hombres que quiere asesinar a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los nuevos amigos de Daryl encuentran a Rick y pretenden violar a Michonne y Carl para después matar a los tres. Mientras, Glenn, Maggie, Sasha, Bob, Tara, Abraham, Eugene y Rosita se dan cuenta de que Terminus no es el paraíso que imaginaron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Tyreese llegan a las inmediaciones de Terminus y descubren que sus amigos están retenidos y van a ser sacrificados para ser comidos. Ahora, el destino de todo el grupo depende de ellos dos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick vaga por el bosque y encuentra a Gabriel, un párroco al que salvan de una horda de zombis y les permite pernoctar en su iglesia. Sin embargo, hay algo extraño en él y esa misma noche uno de los integrantes del grupo es secuestrado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gareth y su grupo de caníbales atacan la iglesia mientras Rick y sus compañeros están en el bosque buscándolos para vengar a Bob. Además, el padre Gabriel confiesa el siniestro acto de su pasado que no deja descansar a su conciencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth se despierta en un hospital de Atlanta, pero pronto se da cuenta de que los mismos que la auxiliaron y sanaron no la dejarán marchar. No obstante, su nuevo amigo, Noah, y ella tratan de huir del recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras se dirigen hacia el norte, el grupo se ve obligado a detenerse porque una horda de zombis bloquea el camino. La tensión aumenta y la situación termina por estallar cuando Eugene confiesa un secreto que había ocultado a todos hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Noah regresan a la iglesia para pedirles ayuda a sus compañeros. Rick y otros integrantes del grupo van a Atlanta con la intención de secuestrar a varios policías para intercambiarlos por Beth y Carol.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca una salida pacífica al conflicto, pero sus enemigos la rechazan y prefieren zanjar las cosas de forma violenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Para cumplir con la promesa que Beth le hizo Noah antes de morir, el grupo se dirige al barrio de Noah, esperando hallar allí protección y a otros supervivientes. Sin embargo, Rick y los suyos no quieren hacerse demasiadas esperanzas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El vehículo se avería y el grupo continúa a pie hacia Washington D. C., pero les sorprende una tormenta y buscan cobijo en un granero, donde encuentran algo totalmente inesperado e inquietante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron invita al grupo a Alexandria, su comunidad, un lugar que, según él, es seguro y amigable. Rick, incapaz de olvidar Woodbury y Terminus, desconfía de Aaron, pero Michonne quiere darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom teaches a homeowner a simple tiling technique; Richard demonstrates a wireless leak detector that prevents floods; Jenn installs a water feature that collects and reuses rainwater.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard breaks down the differences between water filters; Roger removes a tree that’s leaning dangerously; Tom demonstrates ways to locate studs in a wall; Scott installs a smart garage door opener.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: It’s the holiday season at the AskTOH barn! Tom and Kevin build a toy box for Tom’s grandson; Kevin travels to UL to learn about preventing fires from holiday decorations; the guys exchange gifts.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger teaches how to care for orchids; Tom fixes an improperly hung window; Mark demonstrates how to clean brick with acid; Ross finds a solar panel that can generate drinking water from air.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows how to repair a damaged walkway, and also how to identify what caused the damage so it can be prevented; Tom patches a chipped wood floor using a Dutchman and hand tools.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Mark tests out different tools that collect silica dust more efficiently; Richard shims a wobbly toilet; Kevin builds a wooden slice table with Jimmy Diresta, a famous maker.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs an instantaneous water heater; Tom demonstrates some techniques for cutting straight edges with a circular saw; Mark rebuilds a retaining wall stacked with the wrong material.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Siren the Voodoo Doll and Chainsaw are sent into the ring by Angelica Dante to battle the sunny Spring Break 24/7's Crystal Waters and Sandy Shore. In the Main Event, Princess Aussie clashes with fellow Australian, Superhero Genesis.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The unrelenting team of Top Tier starts the night facing The Dojo Defenders who have recruited Sierra Breeze. The All American Girls are back in the ring battling Las Bandidas. In a Main Event, reigning champion The Beast takes on The Classmaster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's an action packed opening match as former champion Penelope Pink battles Tiki Chamorro. Lil J-Boogie makes her way as a singles competitor against Ice Cold. Lana Star's Fabulous Four take on The Tonga Twins in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Samantha Smart assures her team of The Classmaster and The Disciplinarian are ready to challenge The Mother Truckers for their championship in the Main Event. The All American Girls and Ariel Sky set out to beat their bullies in the ring.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie and Tormenta battle Laurie and Lindsey Carlson in the opening match. The WOW World Championship Title Match is here as The Beast must prove she can withstand the force of Penelope Pink who has been gearing up to reclaim her title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Americana and Santana Garrett take on Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx. Lil J-Boogie has an opportunity to prove herself against Coach Campanelli. Las Bandidas get their shot at the tag team championship title as they battle The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's a 6-person tag team match up when Lana Star sends her fabulous team of Penelope Pink and Miami's Sweet Heat to fight The Tonga Twins and Tiki Chamorro. The Beast must defend her championship title against Tormenta in the WOW Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Gigi Gianni and BK Rhythm take on Crystal Waters and Sandy Shore. It's Stephy Slays turn to battle one of Coach Campanelli's lackeys, Gloria Glitter. In the Main Event, Chainsaw and Siren The Voodoo Doll take on champions The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones is back in the ring for a title shot against The Beast. Teammates Pep Riley and Sasha Sparks vie for a top spot in WOW as they fight Las Bandidas. A rematch is set WOW's biggest Australian Superheroes Genesis and Princess Aussie.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Top Tier has been dominating in the ring, but now they face the joint forces of Lil J-Boogie, Stephy Slays, and Ariel Sky who want to make them pay for their underhanded ways. In the Main Event, Tormenta faces former WOW Champion Penelope Pink.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster and a surprise partner, announced by Samantha Smart, take on the Fierce Sisters. Chantilly Chella and Holidead face off with Las Bandidas. In the Main Event, Lana Star challenges the culprits who ran up her hotel bill.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster attempts to put Santana Garrett into detention as they battle in the ring. Also in action is Reina Del Rey, Sandy Shore, Holidead, Genesis and Katarina Jinx. The action heats up and still, so many questions surround WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW's new arena is the perfect setting for the unveiling of the first-ever World Trios Championship Titles. In the Main Event, Penelope Pink and Princess Aussie will wrestle to determine the one contender for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star is excited about two things...her team, Miami's Sweat Heat, defending their WOW World Tag Team Championships against The All American Girls, and the large amount of money The Mother Truckers owe her. And Lana's coming to collect on both!

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A Japanese woman travels to the U.S. to find an American man who proposed to her in Japan and hires Josh to find him since no one will help her in her search.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A banker with a consuming thirst for vengeance hires Randall to accompany him to track down the man he believes responsible for his son's death and a bank robbery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is deputized to transport a ruthless killer to Tucson but exchanges him for the nun kidnapped by the killer's gang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall brings a suspected murderer to Pot Hole but fears the man won't receive a fair trial when he finds the townspeople in the grip of a power-mad bully.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Josh, as a favor to a friend, escorts a beautiful woman to a trial that could see her hang for killing her husband, her lover, and a foreman, she charms him to convince her of her innocenences.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is asked by Stacy Torrance for help when she finds a wanted poster under her door - for her for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh sets out to help a heartbroken wife locate her missing husband, but his mission of mercy meets with a resistant and tight-lipped townspeople.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is bushwhacked by bounty hunters in cahoots with the local sheriff, who now must keep Josh from blowing the whistle on their illegal but lucrative \\"bounty game\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A sadistic pair of killers escape from prison who have no qualms about killing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Following an Indian attack on their stagecoach that kills his prisoner, Randall and an eastern gentleman unaccustomed to the ways of the West must trek to safety across many long, hot miles of hostile Apache territory.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On Christmas, Eve Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet from a young boy who has eight cents to pay: bring in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Thieves are lying in wait to ambush mail carriers and eventually Josh is hired to help ensure that the mail will get through.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is knocked out by a posse who wants his prisoner who is wanted for killing his step-daughter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh needs to get his wounded prisoner to Bannach in three days to prevent an innocent man from hanging.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a small town looking for Vic Warsaw but is told by the Sheriff that Warsaw was buried that day and killed by Miss Lucy Fremont the night before.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Four men break out of prison looking for revenge against Aben Starr who turned them in after their first escape attempt.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is resting in Benson when two bounty hunters bring in a man - the mayor - dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.desc: A rich widow uses her influence to get Bart into a high-stakes poker game in which he wins both stock in a railroad and a colossal headache. Directed by PAUL HENREID.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: A job on a stagecoach crew brings Bart face-to-face with a former girlfriend, a harrowing journey and even more trouble when they finally do reach Fort Doom.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A gunslinger en route to Durango seeks Doc Holliday to gun him down for the murder of his brother. Passing through Tombstone, he becomes the enemy of two of the West's slickest draws -- Sheriff Hollister and the infamous dentist-turned-gunman.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A handsome cowboy makes eyes at an immigrant miner's pretty daughter and upsets her staid European ideals. Betrothed by her father to a young miner, she forsakes him and her old-world traditions by leaving home to become an 'American lady.'

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: George and Patricia Camden, two people out of rancher Aaron McClain's shady past, blackmail him. Aided by a mysterious accomplice, McClain evens the score by murdering George, and Sheriff Hollister is plunged into a dangerous manhunt.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Old Man Clinton forces Bill Doolin - just out of prison - into an attempt to kill Sheriff Clay Hollister as Clay is the only witness against his two renegade sons. Dooline picks a fight with Clay who risks his life to get to the bottom of the plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Julie Dixon takes a job as a dealer in Tombstone's Saloon. Here, she deals a grim hand of vengeance. Her brother Sam, an incurable gambler, had killed Julie's lover six months before. She has taken the job as part of a plan to wreak revenge on Sam.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Vince Harper breaks jail and seeks refuge with an old friend: Editor Claibourne. Believing in Harper's innocence, the editor agrees to hide him until he can uncover new evidence, leading Sheriff Hollister to strike a deal.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Santiago, a rebel leader mortally wounded in a battle with the despot Commandante Nexor, escapes across the border to Tombstone. He begs his old friend Clay to find his younger brother Juan and bring him to him. But Juan has plans of his own.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sam Colby, one of a gang plotting to steal an Army payroll, comes to Tombstone to 'case' the job. But he discovers his ex-sweetheart, Sarah, is about to marry Lieutenant Crane, the commanding officer of the payroll's military escort.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
